about.paragraph: Jordan is an accomplished Art Director and Graphic Designer with a keen eye for visual storytelling and a passion for creating impactful, innovative, and memorable designs. With extensive experience leading creative projects across branding, digital, and print media, Jordan thrives on crafting engaging designs that connect with audiences and deliver results.

experience.paragraph: Managed a team of designers, copywriters, and photographers to deliver projects under tight deadlines. Led the redesign of Coca- Cola's digital assets, improving usability and aesthetic consistency.

Designed comprehensive brand identities, including logos, packaging, and promotional materials. Collaborated with clients like Spotify and Airbnb to translate concepts into visually compelling campaigns.

items.title: Acco Campaign
items.detailes: Revamped Acco's brand with a bold, engaging campaign for global impact.

items.title: Luna Direction
items.detailes: Crafted Luna’s creative direction to elevate brand identity and audience connection.

items.degree: Bachelor of Fine Arts in Graphic Design

items.title: Branding & Identity
items.value: Logo design, typography, packaging, and style guides.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.value: Wireframing, prototyping, user research, and responsive web design.

items.title: Project Management
items.value: Team leadership, client relations, and deadline management.
